title: lepidium pumilum
intro: Lepidium pumilum, also known as American cress or wintercress, is an annual plant of the mustard family (Brassicaceae) native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Lepidium pumilum is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often consumed fresh as a leafy green vegetable in salads or as a garnish.
